# Consensus synthetic fixtures

These fixtures model inferred Consensus MCP payload shapes for Story 27-2.5
(path B synthetic mode). They are deterministic, static JSON records used by
`tests/test_retrieval_consensus_provider.py`.

Provenance: consensus.app MCP/public docs inference as of 2026-04-22.
First live-cassette validation is tracked in follow-on
`27-2.5-live-cassette-refresh`.
